stat_block.craft_requirements: The initial raw materials must include 4,950 gp of silver.

save_results.critical_failure: The creature is stunned 3 and takes double the persistent good damage.
save_results.failure: The creature is stunned 1 and takes the full persistent good damage.
save_results.success: The creature takes half the persistent good damage.

abilities.effect: You hold the sword aloft, making it cast *sunburst* (DC 38 Reflex save).
abilities.name: Activate

stat_block.text: This *+3 greater disrupting greater striking silver longsword* is made from the purest silver. The blade is carefully etched to depict a vast and sprawling necropolis, a place where the dead are laid to rest. Whenever you critically hit an undead creature with *final rest*, the undead creature takes 3d6 persistent good damage, with a DC 36 Fortitude save.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Necromancy
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the necromancy school of magic, typically involving forces of life and death.
